title: ranunculus acriformis var. montanensis
intro: Ranunculus acriformis var. montanensis is a lesser-known variety of the Ranunculus acris species, a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
